basic_details.job_title: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Peon, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sports Coordinator, Kabaddi Instructor, Cricket Instructor, Kayaking Instructor, Physiotherapist, Superintendent (Girls), Peon, Cook
basic_details.short_information: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 11 Sports Coordinator, Kabaddi Instructor, Cricket Instructor, Kayaking Instructor, Physiotherapist, Superintendent (Girls), Peon, Cook Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Chhattisgarh government rules for reserved categories and local women. Maximum age 45 years for SC/ST women including all relaxations. For Sports Coordinator: 35-50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication, NIS Diploma and MPED, Bachelor of Physiotherapy, Graduate with Data Entry Diploma, 12th Pass
qualification.details: Sports Coordinator: Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication from a recognized university. Preference for experience in sports journalism in media institutions, sports federations, academies or sports departments. Kabaddi Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Cricket Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Kayaking Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Physiotherapist: Bachelor of Physiotherapy from a recognized university, UGC recognized Physiotherapy degree, state license, physically fit. Superintendent (Girls): Graduate from a recognized university. One-year diploma/certificate in Data Entry Operator/Programming from a recognized institution. Computer test will be conducted. Peon (Collector rate): Passed 12th class. Proficient in office work. Preference to experienced candidates. Cook (Collector rate): Passed 12th class. Proficient in office work. Skilled in cooking. Physical test will be conducted. Preference to experienced candidates.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Skill Test (for Peon and Cook posts)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada recruitment is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Cook post?
faq.answer: There are 4 vacancies available for the Cook post in the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada recruitment drive. This position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts released by Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada is 21 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the Sports Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Sports Coordinator post, candidates must be a Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication from a recognized university. Experience in sports journalism is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for candidates applying for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these positions is 35 years. However, age relaxation is applicable as per Chhattisgarh government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Peon and Cook posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Peon and Cook posts includes a Walk-in Interview, Document Verification, and a Skill Test. Candidates need to perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Superintendent (Girls) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Superintendent (Girls) post is Rs. 20,675/- per month. This is a contractual position offered by Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada office. Candidates should refer to the official notification for the exact address and reporting time.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada recruitment is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.
